{{Infobox character
| name = Wei Mon Eri
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Wei Mon Eri]] is a ten-year-old girl and a [[Striker]] on the [[Path of the White Fox]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c4">''Unsouled'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Wei Mon Eri]] challenged Wei Shi [[Lindon]] to a duel of honor.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|Eri is a member of the [[Mon family]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c5">''Unsouled'', chapter 5</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Eri was accepted into the [[Holy Wind School]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c11">''Bloodline'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
